name: Create a Hugging Face repository in Artifactory
name_cn: 在 Artifactory 中创建 Hugging Face 仓库
hint: Run: bash modules/ai-catalog/create-repo.sh <NICKNAME> — creates local/remote/virtual repositories with Hugging Face package type
hint_cn: 运行：bash modules/ai-catalog/create-repo.sh <NICKNAME>，创建 Hugging Face 类型的三层仓库

name: Browse AI Catalog and discover available models
name_cn: 浏览 AI Catalog 并发现可用模型
hint: In JFrog UI: navigate to AI Catalog (left sidebar). Browse available models from Hugging Face. Note any models you want to use in your project.
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI 中：进入 AI Catalog（左侧导航）。浏览 Hugging Face 上的可用模型，记录你感兴趣的模型

name: Download an AI model through Artifactory
name_cn: 通过 Artifactory 下载 AI 模型
hint: Install huggingface_hub: pip install huggingface_hub. Then download a tiny model: python3 modules/ai-catalog/sample-project/download_model.py <NICKNAME>
hint_cn: 安装 huggingface_hub：pip install huggingface_hub。运行：python3 modules/ai-catalog/sample-project/download_model.py <NICKNAME>

name: Scan the AI model with Xray and view the security report
name_cn: 使用 Xray 扫描 AI 模型并查看安全报告
hint: In JFrog UI: Artifactory → Repositories → <NICKNAME>-hf-remote → browse to the downloaded model file → click Xray tab to view scan results for malicious code, CVEs, and license issues
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI：Artifactory → Repositories → <NICKNAME>-hf-remote → 找到下载的模型文件 → 点击 Xray 标签查看恶意代码、CVE 和许可证扫描结果

name: Create a Curation Policy to govern AI model downloads
name_cn: 创建 Curation Policy 管控 AI 模型下载
hint: In JFrog UI: Curation → Policies → New Policy (name must contain your nickname, apply to your HuggingFace remote repo, set rule to block models with malicious indicators or high CVEs)
hint_cn: 在 JFrog UI 中：Curation → Policies → New Policy（名称必须含昵称，应用到你的 HuggingFace remote 仓库，设置规则阻断含恶意指标或高危 CVE 的模型）
